source: derived from fixtures/protocol/runtime-smoke/testnet2-pinned.v1.json (SC.10-iv-c): identical Tier-1 params (T_block/T_share/K_max/difficultyRetarget) so the effective genesis spec hash still matches the boole-testnet-2 compiled preset, but perIpRateLimitPer60s is raised so a 3-node loopback mesh (all peers share 127.0.0.1) does not exhaust the admission per-IP quota with gossip traffic. perIpRateLimitPer60s is a node-local Tier-3 calibration knob and is NOT part of GenesisParams, so raising it does not change the network identity.
